# milvus Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `address` (String) Address of Milvus
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key of Milvus
- `db_name` (String) Database name of Milvus to manage
- `enable_tls` (Boolean) Enable TLS for Milvus connection
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password of Milvus
- `server_version` (String) Version of Milvus to manage
- `username` (String) Username of Milvus
